--- order_by.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
ORDER BY a DESC
RETURN a

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLOrderBy{
            Order: 15,
            Items: []*ast.GQLOrderByItem{
              &ast.GQLOrderByItem{
                DirEnd: 30,
                Expr:   &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 24,
                  NameEnd: 25,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
                Dir: "DESC",
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 31,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 38,
                  NameEnd: 39,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph ORDER BY a DESC RETURN a
